column11:
Dept HC: SUM of Direct Labor Associates (Shipping, Ecom, CG/UPH Rec, UPH-LC, Transfers)
Terminations: Forecasted Terminations Based Off Historical Data For Direct Labor Associates
Hires: Requested Hires for Direct Labor Associates
WC/LOA: Active Direct Labor Associates WC/LOA
Working HC: (Dept HC - (Terminations+ WC/LOA))  + Hires
HC Need: Current Week Working HC - Fiscal Week Working HC
